texto: The trend in modern American culture is toward ever more individualized eating... and with every food added to the list of things one does not eat, the shorter becomes the list of people with whom one can enjoy table fellowship... for those of us whose health permits, partaking readily of whatever is offered can be a way of affirming that eating together is at least as important as whatever it is that is eaten.
explicacao: Citação de Margaret Kim Peterson sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “The trend in modern American culture is toward ever more individualized eating... and with every …” articula felicidade, fellowship, food em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como termino e food.
